purpose: Research reliable archive validation/extraction routes for MetaBlooms OS boot in the ChatGPT Linux sandbox.

web_run_sources.claim: Info-ZIP UnZip can list, test, and extract ZIP archives and recreates stored directory structure by default.
libarchive/bsdtar supports ZIP and other archive formats, uses streaming architecture, and includes command-line tools.
7-Zip command-line supports list, test, and extract-with-full-paths commands.
7-Zip x preserves directory structure and -o sets the output directory.

sandbox_probe_summary.python_mode: python3 -S available and preferred for stdlib-only extraction/validation
